title: Context Size Impact on Performance
gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 Laptop GPU (8GB VRAM)
test_prompt: Write a Python function to check if a string is a palindrome

analysis.generation_speed: MoXing is 2.5x faster than Ollama (40 t/s vs 15.5 t/s) for omnicoder-9b
analysis.prompt_speed: Ollama is 2x faster than MoXing (620 t/s vs 300 t/s)
analysis.context_impact: Context size has minimal impact on generation speed
analysis.ollama_default: Ollama uses 32k context by default, causing partial CPU offloading
analysis.memory_usage: Ollama offloads 1.3GB to CPU due to limited VRAM with 32k context

conclusions: Context size (2k-32k) has minimal impact on generation speed for both tools
MoXing maintains full GPU offloading across all context sizes
Ollama offloads layers to CPU when context + model exceeds VRAM
CPU offloading causes 2.5x slowdown in Ollama for omnicoder-9b
For qwen3:8b, MoXing achieves 46.5 t/s vs Ollama's similar speed when fully on GPU
